hooks.description: GCV-1: export durable governance identity (COORD_PROVIDER/SESSION_ID/TRANSCRIPT/INSTANCE_ID + CLAUDE_SESSION_ID) via CLAUDE_ENV_FILE; source-aware (preserves instance id on clear/compact)

hooks.command: echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'gov commit' && coord/scripts/gov heartbeat $(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '[A-Z]+-\d+' | head -1) 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.description: Auto-sync lock HEAD after every gov commit

hooks.command: echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'gov start|coord/scripts/agent do' && WT=$(echo "$TOOL_OUTPUT" | grep -oP 'worktree=\K[^ ]+' 2>/dev/null | head -1) && [ -z "$WT" ] && WT=$(echo "$TOOL_OUTPUT" | grep -oP '"worktree":\s*"\K[^"]+' 2>/dev/null | head -1) || true; [ -n "${WT:-}" ] && cd "$WT" 2>/dev/null && git fetch origin dev && git rebase origin/dev 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.description: Auto-rebase governed worktree after gov start or agent do

hooks.command: echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'gov land|coord/scripts/agent land' && echo "$TOOL_OUTPUT" | grep -q '"status": "merged"' && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const m=fs.existsSync('coord/TEST_MATURITY.md')?fs.readFileSync('coord/TEST_MATURITY.md','utf8'):''; const last=m.match(/Last updated: (.*)/); if(!last||last[1]==='not yet run'){console.log('ADVISORY: Test maturity has never been audited. Consider running /test-strategy after this epic.')}else{const d=new Date(last[1]); const age=Math.floor((Date.now()-d.getTime())/86400000); if(age>7)console.log('ADVISORY: Test maturity last audited '+age+' days ago. Consider running /test-strategy.')}" 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.description: Advise test-strategy run after governed landing if maturity is stale

hooks.command: ( echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'gov land|coord/scripts/agent land' || exit 0; echo "$TOOL_OUTPUT" | grep -q '"status": "merged"' || exit 0; TICKET=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '[A-Z]+-\d+' | head -1); [ -n "$TICKET" ] || exit 0; REPO_ROOT=$(node -e "const p=require('./coord/paths.js').createCoordPaths(); const t=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(p.boardPath,'utf8')); const rows=t.sections.flatMap(s=>s.rows||[]); const r=rows.find(r=>r.ID==='$TICKET'); if(r&&r.Repo!=='X'){const root=p.repoRoots[r.Repo]; if(root)console.log(root)}" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$REPO_ROOT" ] || exit 0; git -C "$REPO_ROOT" diff origin/dev~1..origin/dev --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.test\.' && exit 0; echo "ADVISORY: Last landed ticket ($TICKET) diff has no test files. Consider checking /test-strategy $TICKET for coverage gaps." ) 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.description: Advise when a landed ticket has no test files in its diff
Auto-refresh code symbol index after every file edit (git-mode: only changed files, <100ms)
Auto-refresh code symbol index after every file write (git-mode: only changed files, <100ms)

hooks.command: echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git (merge|cherry-pick|push).*dev' && echo 'BLOCKED: Never merge to dev manually. Use gov land or gov finalize.' && exit 1 || true
hooks.description: Block direct merges to dev — must use governed landing
